PHI  |  OAK
The Oaks Crown Apartments
8/11 Irving Street, Phillip ACT 2606
Unit 8  ·  Level 2  ·  Parking: Level B2, Bay 8
Without Parking With Parking
🔑   Step 1 — Collect Your Keys
Your keys are in an on-site lockbox attached to the tree on Irving Street, near the building entrance. Enter the code provided in your check-in message to open it.
From across the road, spot the tree to the right of the building entrance — the lockbox is chained to the trunk.
View from across Irving Street — tree with lockbox is on the right
Walk up to the tree next to the parking metre on the footpath. The lockbox is chained to the trunk.
Lockbox is attached to the base of this tree
The arrow points directly to the lockbox. Enter your code to open and retrieve the keys.
Open the lockbox and collect your keys — a black button remote (garage), a grey fob (lifts & building entry), and a door key.
Your key set:  Black remote → opens garage doors  ·  Grey fob → activates lifts & building  ·  Door key → Unit 8
🚶   Step 2 — Enter the Building
Head to the main building entrance at 11 Irving Street. Use the grey fob on the door reader to enter, then proceed to the lifts.
Inside the lift, tap your grey fob on the card reader panel to activate it, then press Level 2.
Tap grey fob on reader, then press Level 2 (circled in orange)
Exit on Level 2 and proceed to Unit 8. Use your door key to enter. Welcome!
🚗   Step 2 — Enter the Carpark
Carpark entrance is at 9 Irving Street — to the left side of the gym. Use the black button remote to open all garage doors.
Step 1  —  Drive to 9 Irving Street. The carpark entry is between the building signage and the gym — the arrow shows the entry point.
Carpark entry at 9 Irving Street — follow the arrow
Step 2  —  Drive down the entry ramp and press the black button remote to open the roller door. Proceed inside.
Press remote to open roller door, then drive down
🧭   Step 3 — Navigate to Bay 8 (Level B2)
Step 3  —  Follow the arrows straight ahead through the carpark.
Step 4  —  Continue following the arrows, bearing around the bend toward the ramp.
Step 5  —  Head down the first ramp, following the directional arrow.
Step 6  —  At the bottom, turn LEFT at the yellow poles and continue down the second ramp.
Turn LEFT at the yellow poles, then down the second ramp
Step 7  —  After the second ramp, take another LEFT — Bay 8 is straight ahead.
Step 8  —  Park in Bay 8 — marked on the floor. It is a double-length bay.
Bay 8 — park anywhere within the marked space
🛗   Step 4 — Lift to Your Apartment
Step 9  —  The lifts are at the end of the carpark behind you. Walk through the glass doors.
Glass lift doors at the end of the carpark — Level B2
Step 10  —  ⚠️ Use the white card (on your key ring) to activate the lift panel, then press Level 2. Proceed to Unit 8.
Tap white card on reader, press Level 2 (circled in orange)
